templates.name: OTP Verification
templates.useCase: Send a one-time password code for account verification or login confirmation.
templates.description: A concise OTP email with a dominant code block, expiry note, and security warning.

templates.name: Payment Failed
templates.useCase: Notify a customer that a payment failed and prompt them to update payment details.
templates.description: A billing recovery email with one clear payment update action.

templates.name: Welcome account
templates.description: A clean onboarding email for a newly created workspace or account.
